title: Kenai Peninsula Communities Struggle for Baseline Water Data Amid Climate Uncertainty

Seldovia, Alaska — a quintessential sleepy fishing town on the southern edge of the Kenai Peninsula — starts to wake up around late May. By then, the first salmon are running.
